name: SheetsData
description: Electronic component datasheets for AI agents — specs, pinouts, package data on demand. No PDFs required.

authentication.instructions: Get your API key at https://sheetsdata.com/dashboard/keys

tools.name: search_parts
tools.description: Search for electronic components by part number, description, or keyword across JLCPCB, Mouser, and DigiKey.

tools.name: search_datasheets
tools.description: Semantic search across all extracted datasheets using natural language queries.

tools.name: get_part_details
tools.description: Full component details by MPN — pricing, stock, parameters from all providers.

tools.name: read_datasheet
tools.description: Extract structured datasheet sections (summary, pinout, electrical, package) or semantic search within a datasheet.

tools.name: compare_parts
tools.description: Compare 2-5 parts side by side with merged provider data.

tools.name: check_design_fit
tools.description: Validate a part against operating conditions. Returns PASS/FAIL/WARNING per parameter.

tools.name: find_alternative
tools.description: Find alternative/substitute components with similar specs, same package, or compatible pinout.

tools.name: analyze_image
tools.description: Vision AI analysis of datasheet images — graphs, package drawings, pin diagrams.

tools.name: prefetch_datasheets
tools.description: Batch warm-up extraction for up to 20 parts. Fire-and-forget.

tools.name: check_extraction_status
tools.description: Poll extraction progress after prefetch or read_datasheet.
